channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.mmorpg.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.mmorpg.com

item.title: Mortal Online 2 PTR Coming Next Week Featuring the New Party System & Overhauled Journal
item.content:encoded:
Mortal Online 2’s next Spring PTR is coming next week, with the next update including the new party system, new Chronicle page, and overhauled Journal. 

The PTR will be up on Wednesday, April 29th. The team proposed a party system a while back and the community responded in favor, saying that it  would be likely to make people feel more encouraged to group up and  even to play with strangers. Another question the community responded to was whether to display names and health bars for party members. While most were also in favor here, some expressed concern over UI clutter. 

Along with this system, Star Vault is working on UI overhauls that intend to make things clearer and less obtrusive, and that work will also cover the party system when it lands. The PTR will include party system changes, although as of late March, the UI overhauls weren’t ready to be shown yet, but we’ll see what actually makes it into the test build next week.

The Journal overhaul is part of the work the team is doing to make way for the upcoming new continent of Sarducca, which the PTR announcement says is a main focus of the team right now. 

The list of improvements are extensive, from a new visual layout, titles categorized into four groups and selectable from the journal UI, new titles to unlock within groups, and Discovery groups with progress bars to let you know how close you are to unlocking new milestone titles. 

Are the two main focus points of next week’s test  if you want to get in and see how the party system works, as well as preview the new Journal.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/mortal-online-2-ptr-coming-next-week-featuring-the-new-party-system-and-overhauled-journal-2000137885
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Nexon Announces Dark Fantasy MMORPG Embers of the Uncrowned With Brutal Cinematic
item.content:encoded:
Embers of the Uncrowned is an upcoming dark fantasy MMORPG just revealed by Nexon with a new cinematic trailer that gives a taste of the grim and violent world.

The game is set in a world that has been destroyed by an elven invasion (which I admit, I accidentally first read as alien invasion) and sets you on a hero’s journey to help rebuild a fallen noble house and reclaim the lands that humans once ruled. We get a taste of what’s going on with the cinematic trailer introducing the game.

The trailer, “An Elf” shows a group of knights who come upon a mysterious elf seated in  clearing in the middle of a ruined village. It doesn't take too long for Bella, the elf, to change and for things to go fully sideways for the knights. Bella changes, and uses liquid silvery tendrils to tear them apart and absorb their blood. As she walks off, changed now, we see a flash of a phoenix signet ring that’s surely to come up again.

Embers of the Uncrowned features a tactical, intense isometric view combat system, with brutal visuals and gore. Your choice of classes include the Spectral Blade, Executioner, and Stormbringer, and the team says that you'll need more than force. You'll need to be coordinated, and employ tactical strategy in combat, including co-op battles against bosses, and in raids.

The game will also feature customization, progression, and ways to  shape your experience through gaining influence through a system called the House Harborwell,  which lets you  start by building a camp and eventually transform and grow it into a city. This is tied into the narrative as well as simple player customization.

You can wishlist the game on Steam. The Steam page also says a playable demo is coming soon, so you can get an idea of what Embers of the Uncrowned is like and some in-game launch cosmetics for your time.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/nexon-announces-dark-fantasy-mmorpg-embers-of-the-uncrowned-with-brutal-cinematic-2000137883
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
